children.heading: Restriction on Federal funding of health care services
children.label: a Restriction on Federal funding of health care services

children.text: to provide any health care item or service furnished for the purpose of causing, or for the purpose of assisting in causing, the death of any individual, such as by assisted suicide, euthanasia, or mercy killing;

to pay (directly, through payment of Federal financial participation or other matching payment, or otherwise) for such an item or service, including payment of expenses relating to such an item or service; or
to pay (in whole or in part) for health benefit coverage that includes any coverage of such an item or service or of any expenses relating to such an item or service.

children.heading: Construction and treatment of certain services
children.label: b Construction and treatment of certain services

children.text: the withholding or withdrawing of medical treatment or medical care;
the withholding or withdrawing of nutrition or hydration;
abortion; or

the use of an item, good, benefit, or service furnished for the purpose of alleviating pain or discomfort, even if such use may increase the risk of death, so long as such item, good, benefit, or service is not also furnished for the purpose of causing, or the purpose of assisting in causing, death, for any reason.

children.heading: Limitation on Federal facilities and employees
children.label: c Limitation on Federal facilities and employees

children.text: by or in a health care facility owned or operated by the Federal government, or
by any physician or other individual employed by the Federal government to provide health care services within the scope of the physician’s or individual’s employment,

children.heading: List of programs to which restrictions apply
children.label: d List of programs to which restrictions apply

children.label: 1 Federal health care funding programs

children.label: A Medicare program

children.label: D Maternal and child health block grant program

children.label: G Federal employees health benefits program

children.heading: Federal facilities and personnel
children.label: 2 Federal facilities and personnel

children.heading: Military health care system
children.label: A Military health care system
children.text: The Department of Defense operating under chapter 55 of title 10.

children.heading: Veterans medical care
children.label: B Veterans medical care
children.text: The Veterans Health Administration of the Department of Veterans Affairs.

children.heading: Public Health Service
children.label: C Public Health Service
children.text: The Public Health Service.

children.heading: Nonexclusive list
children.label: 3 Nonexclusive list
children.text: Nothing in this subsection shall be construed as limiting the application of subsection (a) to the programs specified in paragraph (1) or the application of subsection (c) to the facilities and personnel specified in paragraph (2).
